title: Magnetic Typography
description: Letters respond to cursor proximity with spring physics — exploring typographic affordance.

title: Elastic Cursor
description: A cursor that stretches toward interactive targets — micro-feedback as navigation.

title: Morphing CTA
description: Button states that morph rather than swap — continuity in action confirmation.

title: Interaction Network
description: Connected nodes that react to scroll velocity — a living systems visualization.

title: Scroll Reveal
description: Editorial text that assembles from fragments on scroll — narrative through motion.

title: Physics Toggle
description: Switch with realistic spring damping — haptic-feeling digital controls.
